name: Ken Schall Golf Performance
address: 2700 University Ave Suite 330, West Des Moines, IA 50266
about: Ken Schall Golf Performance is a state-of-the-art teaching and club fitting studio established in 2015. The facility is powered by industry-leading Trackman radar and SAM Putt Lab technologies, enabling detailed analysis of swings and putting mechanics. Staffed entirely by PGA Professionals, the studio offers a serious practice environment with a focus on game improvement through technology-driven instruction, club fitting, and repair services. It caters to golfers of all abilities with a structured approach to coaching, including game evaluations and a junior development program called The Podium Project.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman and SAM Putt Lab technology for precise data analysis
PGA Professional instruction with regular training and a focus on scoring, not just swings
Flexible simulator rental hours available early morning and late at night for focused practice

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor used for all game analysis and lessons.
Also utilized as a secondary launch monitor for data gathering.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility is fully equipped and club rentals are available. You can also bring your own clubs for lessons, practice, or fitting sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The studio's focus is on practice and instruction; no food or beverage service is mentioned. Bringing outside items may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulator session is not explicitly timed, but the environment is designed for focused practice and individual play, allowing players to complete rounds at their own pace.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Ken Schall Golf offers junior programs, including The Podium Project for high school students, and is dedicated to developing young golfers, making it a kid-friendly environment.
